events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **fail / high risk**. The lug torque sequence (star pattern) wasn't followed per OEM spec — this risks uneven clamping and rotor/hub distortion, a safety-critical brake defect. Since the work is only rough-complete, it's fully correctable: loosen and re-torque in proper star pattern with staged torque values, then re-verify before advancing past the quality gate.
